---
name: agent-framework
description: "Use this skill when the user is working with the Microsoft Agent Framework and needs to create, manage, or troubleshoot agents, their interactions, or the overall multi-agent system architecture. This includes tasks such as defining agent roles and responsibilities, implementing agent behaviors and communication patterns, debugging agent interactions, or optimizing the performance of the multi-agent system. Use this skill even if they do not explicitly mention the Agent Framework but are describing tasks that align with its capabilities, such as multi-agent coordination, agent communication, or distributed AI systems. Do not use it for general AI programming tasks that do not involve the specific concepts and patterns of the Agent Framework, such as single-agent applications, non-agent-based AI models, or unrelated software development tasks."
---

# Agent Framework Skill
